summary: Dominant drag: chapter 12 fully establishes the Margins, but chapters 13 and 14 keep re-opening the same landscape and rescue pattern, so the window deepens emotionally while feeling structurally repetitive.

findings.evidence: Dren's arm is fully established as the badly healed silo wound at snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:2645, reiterated at snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3004 and snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3294, then reintroduced twice more at snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3557 and snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3713.
findings.problem: Across consecutive chapters the reader keeps receiving the same silo-wound and bad-stitches briefing instead of simply carrying the injury forward as known context, so the chapter boundaries feel mildly reset backward.
findings.rewrite_direction: After chapter 11, treat the injury as internalized reader knowledge. Later mentions should only add a new present-tense consequence, such as Dren being unable to enter the rescue at snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3595, without restating the wound origin and stitch quality.
findings.acceptance_test: A back-to-back read of chapters 12-14 learns the injury once; later references only show fresh functional limits or pain, not the same wound history.
findings.fix_owner_reason: Chapter 14 owns this because it repeats the already-internalized injury twice after chapters 11-13 have already taught the reader the condition.

findings.evidence: Chapter 12 already explains the Margins bureaucracy in detail through the notice board and Kem's math at snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:2974 and snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:2994. Chapter 13 restates the same regime through posted notices at snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3296, and chapter 14 does it again through fresh notices at snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3553 and snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3563.
findings.problem: The window keeps re-explaining the same fact that the Margins are governed by extractive Productivity Tier bureaucracy, so later chapter boundaries feel like another orientation pass instead of escalation.
findings.rewrite_direction: Let chapter 12 do the full bureaucratic reveal. In chapters 13 and 14, only surface a notice if it adds a new local stake or contradiction; otherwise rely on the reader's retained knowledge of the system.
findings.acceptance_test: In a consecutive read of chapters 12-14, the first chapter teaches the system and later chapters build on it without restating Productivity Tier logic unless a new notice changes the situation.
findings.fix_owner_reason: Chapter 14 owns this because by the third notice-based reminder the repetition has clearly become a boundary-local reading problem.

findings.evidence: Chapter 12 opens by inventorying chalk-pale soil and cheap Shaping at snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:2954 and snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:2960. Chapter 13 opens with another road-and-ruin inventory at snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3284 and snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3296. Chapter 14 opens with a third version of the same road, notice, and depletion reset at snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3543 and snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3563.
findings.problem: Three consecutive chapters begin by re-establishing the same depleted-road and administrative-wreckage atmosphere before the chapter's real engine starts, which gives the window a stop-start rhythm instead of cumulative propulsion.
findings.rewrite_direction: Let one chapter keep the full Margins re-orientation, then open the later chapters inside a new active pressure: the collapse itself, the aftermath of the confrontation, a Scour-specific hazard, or evidence of the pursuit closing in.
findings.acceptance_test: On a back-to-back read, each chapter's first page introduces a distinct immediate pressure rather than another travel-and-depletion reset.
findings.fix_owner_reason: Chapter 14 owns this because the third consecutive opening in the same mode is where the rhythm hardens into a visible pattern.

findings.evidence: After chapter 12's labor-camp and infrastructure-spending sequence at snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3086 and snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3129, chapter 13 pivots to another failing-structure rescue when the road collapses and Kem spends twelve levels at snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3302 and snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3318. Chapter 14 then stages another subsidence rescue in a tilting building, with Vel diagnosing structure and Kem executing precise spends, at snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3579 and snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3659.
findings.problem: The emotional meanings change, but the external shape keeps repeating: ruined Margins infrastructure, civilians in danger, Vel assessing, Kem spending, aftermath arithmetic. By chapter 14 the cluster feels like it is proving the same point through a third variation instead of forcing a new kind of ordeal.
findings.rewrite_direction: Keep one post-labor-camp rescue as the model beat, then give the next chapter a different external engine such as pursuit pressure, navigation failure, negotiation, or Scour-specific mechanics. If chapter 14 keeps the rescue, it needs to deliver new plot leverage beyond another successful extraction and lower number.
findings.acceptance_test: Back-to-back chapters no longer hinge on two structurally similar collapse-rescue-spend sequences; the later chapter presents a distinct obstacle pattern with its own leverage.
findings.fix_owner_reason: Chapter 14 owns this because the later and weaker reuse is where the repetition becomes reader-visible across the window.

findings.evidence: Vel puts Maren's route journal away with 'the care she applied to nothing else she owned' at snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3229. Chapter 13 repeats the same framing almost verbatim at snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3354, and chapter 14 returns to the same signal again at snapshots/cycle_01/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3745.
findings.problem: Because the same sentence-level marker recurs in three consecutive chapters, the journal clue starts to feel mechanically underlined rather than progressively discovered.
findings.rewrite_direction: Keep the strong formulation once. In later chapters, advance the thread by changing the lens from handling to inference, so Kem learns something new from the journal without hearing the same emphasis phrase again.
findings.acceptance_test: A consecutive read notices the journal deepening as a live emotional thread, but no repeated wording calls attention to the clue more than once.
findings.fix_owner_reason: Chapter 14 owns this because the third recurrence is where the prose tic becomes unmistakable in a window read.
